title: fagelia terniflora
intro: Fagelia terniflora, also known as the Fagelia plant, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Fagelia terniflora can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
